title: Tigerland
starring: Sammy Davis Jr., Sarah Michelle Gellar, Linda Cardellini, Colin Farrell
summary: Four friends who run an abandoned-places YouTube channel travel to a remote Malaysian island known as Tigerland, once home to a private tiger breeding programme rumoured to have involved genetic experimentation and dangerous abnormalities. When their boatman is killed and they become stranded, their light-hearted investigation turns into a desperate survival horror as something enormous stalks them through the jungle, the beach, and the ruins they came to film.
